import React from 'react' const PaymentDetails = ({ totals }) => { return (

Payment Details

Complete your order by providing your payment details.

Subtotal

${(totals?.discountTotal ?? 0).toFixed(2)}

Shipping

$8.00

Total

${((totals?.discountTotal ?? 0) + 8.0).toFixed(2)}

) } export default PaymentDetails
